infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Jejak Masjid uses your location to find nearby masjids for check-in. For example, when you visit Masjid Negara, we verify your location to award points for your visit. This enables you to discover masjids within 5km of your current location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Jejak Masjid uses your location to find nearby masjids for check-in. For example, when you visit Masjid Negara, we verify your location to award points for your visit. This enables you to discover masjids within 5km of your current location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This allows you to select photos from your library to upload and share with the community. For example, you can add photos of a masjid you visited.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This allows you to take photos to upload and share with the community. For example, you can capture photos of a masjid during your visit.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your Face ID biometric data.
